violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. . Re-inspection will occur on or before Dec. 2nd 2025 unless otherwise notified of reasonable delay.

HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the kitchen. Soap was replaced to correct the violation. Hand towels noted not provided at the hand washing in the bar. Paper towels were replaced to correct the violation.
